title: Arctic (and Antarctic!) Sea Ice Extent: September 28, 2023
summary: September 28 2023: Sea ice extent has now turned around and had an increase , at the rate of 4.30% , from the level on 09/20/2023 of 4.251 M km 2 to 4.442 M km 2 for this week. Preliminary analysis by the NSIDC finds that this years minimum extent occurred on 09/19/2023 at an extent of 4.23 km 2 . T...
